name: Americor
description_short: Americor is a FinTech debt relief company offering debt settlement and consolidation services to help consumers reduce unsecured debt by up to 50% in 24-48 months.
description_long:
Americor is a FinTech company specializing in debt relief solutions for consumers struggling with unsecured debt. Founded as a next-generation platform, the company uses proprietary technology to connect clients with debt resolution services and consolidation options. The company reports having helped over 200,000 individuals and families eliminate more than $2 billion in debt.

Americor offers two primary debt relief pathways: debt consolidation loans through partner Credit9 (for qualifying applicants), and the Americor Advantage debt resolution program for those who don't qualify for consolidation. The resolution program negotiates with creditors to reduce total debt owed, lowers monthly payments, and eliminates long-term interest fees. After six months in the resolution program, clients may qualify for a consolidation loan through Credit9 to pay off remaining creditors and improve credit scores.

Americor distinguishes itself through a fee structure aligned with client success—charging no upfront or cancellation fees and only collecting a percentage-based fee after debts are settled. The company operates under FTC regulation and maintains an A+ rating with the Better Business Bureau. The platform offers free debt analysis with no obligation, claims checking rates won't impact credit scores, and advertises typical debt reductions of 46-66% across client success stories.

The company's model depends on creditor negotiation success, meaning results vary significantly by individual circumstances. While the company emphasizes industry regulation and consumer protections, debt settlement does negatively impact credit scores during the program period and may trigger tax consequences on forgiven debt amounts. The success stories provided show significant savings but represent best-case outcomes rather than guaranteed results.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: No upfront fees or sign-up charges—fees only collected after settlement approval
Free debt analysis and no obligation to complete the program
Claims to reduce enrolled debt by up to 50% with 24-48 month timeline
Combines negotiation with consolidation loan option through Credit9 partner after 6 months
A+ Better Business Bureau rating and FTC-regulated operations
Reports having helped 200,000+ clients and resolved $2 billion+ in debt
Checking rates doesn't impact credit score (soft inquiry)
cons: Debt settlement negatively impacts credit scores during the resolution program period
Forgiven debt may be treated as taxable income, creating unexpected tax liability
Results vary significantly—success stories show 46-66% reductions but these appear to be best-case outcomes
Requires creditor cooperation; creditors have no obligation to accept settlement offers
Program fees (percentage-based after settlement) and debt consolidation loan terms not fully disclosed on website
best_for: Consumers with $7,500+ in unsecured debt (credit cards, personal loans, medical bills) struggling with multiple monthly payments
Those unable to qualify for traditional debt consolidation loans who want to avoid bankruptcy
Individuals willing to accept short-term credit score damage to reduce total debt owed significantly
diagnosis: Americor is best for consumers carrying $7,500+ in unsecured debt who are willing to negotiate with creditors and accept temporary credit score damage in exchange for significant principal reduction. The main caveat is that results depend entirely on creditor willingness to settle, forgiven debt may create tax liability, and the success stories shown represent the higher end of typical outcomes rather than guarantees.
services: Debt negotiation and settlement services through Americor Advantage program
Debt consolidation loan origination (through Credit9 partner)
Creditor negotiation and reduction of total debt owed
Consolidation loans after 6 months of resolution program success
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 18200 Von Karman Ave 6th floor, Irvine, CA 92612
